verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Around the walls of Jericho Around the walls of Jericho Around the walls of Jericho The army went.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Seven times without a stop Seven times without a stop Seven times without a stop The army went.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the people gave a SHOUT When the people gave a SHOUT When the people gave a SHOUT!!! The walls fell down.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So, into Jericho at last Into Jericho at last Into Jericho at last The army went.
